description: Patient describes symptoms that should trigger adverse-event intake without explicitly saying they want to file a report.

turns.speaker: user
turns.message: Hi, I started taking Cardiolase two days ago and since then I have been really dizzy and throwing up. I was calling to ask if that can happen.

turns.speaker: expected_system
message_traits: treats the message as safety-sensitive even without explicit reporting language
asks for minimum reportable information if not yet complete

turns.speaker: user
turns.message: My name is Elena Santos. I am the one taking it, and the dizziness started yesterday evening.

turns.speaker: expected_system
message_traits: uses the follow-up information to continue minimum safety intake
recognizes the patient as the identifiable patient when enough information is given
prepares to create a safety event form when minimum fields are complete
